summary: Reply-probability bands and the action-to-response-class mapping for src/ultra_csm/world/response.py. Ratified alongside docs/SYNTHETIC_UNIVERSE_BIBLE.md's 'World response' section -- the two must stay in sync; a config change is a bible change first.

paraphrases: Please confirm there's no setup charge if implementation starts before the deadline.
Can you note that onboarding fees are being waived for this launch window?
Let them know the setup cost is being dropped if they move fast on this.
Confirm the EU residency feature will be live before their contract renews.
Please assure them the requested region support ships ahead of renewal.
Tell them the roadmap item they asked about is already committed for this quarter.
Mention that legal has already signed off on the security review.
Confirm the DPA cleared review and there's nothing further needed from them.
Let them know the security assessment passed without any open items.
Say engineering closed out the bug and no more logs are needed from them.
Confirm the issue they reported is fully resolved on our end now.
Let them know the fix shipped and they can stop tracking that ticket.
Mention we can lock in current pricing through the renewal.
Let them know a loyalty discount is available if they renew this month.
Confirm we'll match whatever rate they were quoted by a competitor.
Just email the champion directly today, even though they haven't opted into outreach.
Reach out to the exec sponsor now regardless of their stated contact preferences.
Skip the consent check and send this straight to the primary contact.

provenance: authored for MP-W1R (F2R Measured Quarter runway)
